strategy_doc_section_loaded: Homework: build and verify (Big Idea, Mood deliberate, hero move, teaching moment, bridge) + Mood Arc M3 paragraph

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood contract named — capable next step honoured throughout
Lead with discipline, not failure mode — Big Idea and What You'll Build bullets
rules_evaluated.evidence: line:5: 'The live session gives you the shape. Homework turns it into a small system in your own folder.' — foregrounds the artifact (small system) rather than the embodied skill (muscle memory). Strategy doc Big Idea: 'the homework turns it into personal muscle memory.' The payoff is the habit, not the thing built.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Rewrite Big Idea to surface muscle memory (the repeatable practice) as the payoff: 'The live session gives the shape. Homework is how the shape becomes personal muscle memory.'

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategy-fidelity — M3 positioning, no front-running of M4 or live-session moments
Strategic themes recur — C-question (trust/custodianship) and D-question (where this is going) surface in What to Notice
Key Concepts shape — emergent, discipline-led, no front-running; §§3/4/5 gates run first
What You'll Build (= What You'll Learn) shape — capability register, strategic verbs lead, no apparatus failure modes
